details: Dependency-confusion package targeting internal scoped names. On install, the preinstall and install hooks collect the installer's username, hostname, current working directory, and package name, base64-encode them, and exfiltrate them via an HTTPS GET to hxxps://<package-name-subdomain>.callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk/<base64-payload> and via a DNS nslookup to <base64-package-name>.<package-name-subdomain>.callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk. The package contains no functional code — index.js is an empty module export. The C2/exfiltration domain is callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk. Dependency-confusion packages published under the @pimy-b2cweb scope at version 99.99.99. Both preinstall and install hooks collect system information (username, hostname, working directory, package name) via base64-encoded HTTPS GET requests and DNS lookups to callback[.]m0chan[.]co[.]uk. The hooks run curl and nslookup to exfiltrate the encoded data to the C2 domain.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
